message:
feat(web): add CORS middleware with configurable origin/method/header policies

Implement CorsMiddleware for the web framework with full preflight and
simple-request CORS handling:

- CorsPolicy: configurable origin matching (Any or Exact set), allowed
  methods, headers, exposed headers, max-age, and credentials flag
- CorsAllowOrigin enum: Any (*) or Exact(Vec<String>) for origin matching
- Preflight handling: responds to OPTIONS requests with appropriate
  Access-Control-Allow-* headers and 204 No Content
- Simple request handling: appends CORS headers after inner handler runs
- Builder methods: with_origins(), with_credentials(), with_max_age()
- Implements Middleware trait for use with Router::with_middleware()

Includes tests for wildcard/exact origin, rejected origin, preflight
with custom methods, credential header propagation, and max-age.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
